script.title: Obtener cliente Tia
script.code:
<?php
$url = 'https://68.155.90.178/api/token/party/api/';
$url = $url.  $_request['id_cliente'];
echo $url;
$curl = curl_init($url);


curl_setopt_array($curl, [
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT        => 10,
    CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 30,
    //CURLOPT_VERBOSE        => true,
    CURLOPT_STDERR         => $f,
    CURLOPT_IPRESOLVE      => CURL_IPRESOLVE_V4,
    // En pruebas puedes dejarlo en false, pero lo ideal es true/2 con el CA bien instalado
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => false,
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 0,
      CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,             

    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER     => [
        'Content-Type: application/json',
    ],
]);

$res = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);

$response = json_decode($res,true);

$json = $response['access_token'];

return $json;

    "tipo_produccion"                => 1,
    "segmento"                       => 1,
    "operaciones_moneda_transfronteriza" => true,

];

exec($cmd, $output, $returnVar);

$response = implode("\n", $output);

echo "Código retorno: $returnVar\n";

//$curl = curl_init('https://68.155.90.178/api/token/party/api/party-ws/party/v1/1805350442');
//$curl = curl_init('https://68.155.90.178/api/document/no/party/party-ws/party/v1/CC/1805350442');

//$path = "/api/document/api/party-ws/party/v1/CED/1016037034";
$path = "/api/document/api/party-ws/party/v1/";

$docType = $data["frm_tomador_tipoDoc"];
$numDoc = $data["frm_tomador_numDoc"];

$path = $path . $docType .'/'.$numDoc;

$url_full = $url . "". $path;

//$url_full = 'https://68.155.90.178/api/document/api/party-ws/party/v1/CED/9986387244';


//$url_full_asegurado = 'https://68.155.90.178/api/document/api/party-ws/party/v1/CED/1016037034';

//frm_aseguradoEsTomador || SI

$curl = curl_init($url_full);
/*$tipoDoc = $data['frmCCTom_tipoDoc'];
$numDoc = $data['frmCCTom_numDoc'];*/
$auth = $data['respuesta_token_tia'];
//$auth = 'eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsInR5cCIgOiAiSldUIiwia2lkIiA6ICI0RExIOUk3Y1hNLWVjbVhhN3J0WUh1MFFYdHREMDlYaEhsb3l3SzlUTUhBIn0..pmb6_lo8c8RB6DKSvz2ElAkCc927MqjhGYz0zIMB7NjUEu5MmPrIx1-vmvLeb-v86W4pfTORKnZqh4RshyWnDkCNzL8HnXgzAfw0eG5gvLyNKl52W-fUk9OybakEgOFO0LhwqpWLhtZiiC8KoiTl1IJsFKA9lNeTiFBCG3KgxsJ0vIccLAWyOB3RJA3ygZkxaiM-cavALTkDXjk25Mo4bfn5JadykRSeoo5b5v-wbha6xvINQaP-eXznmQC2-Slg-rjoRZXtBejZVHZB4Fu5kn_f5XNgMgdDov9UufIZYFDK0mQpASCgLnWsIBISAA-GvHRXCgVgsuhoYwHCIhx-zg';

if($auth == ''){
    echo "Sin token";
    //return "Sin token aun";
}

curl_setopt_array($curl, [
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT        => 10,
    CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 30,
    //CURLOPT_VERBOSE        => true,
    CURLOPT_STDERR         => $f,
    CURLOPT_IPRESOLVE      => CURL_IPRESOLVE_V4,
    // En pruebas puedes dejarlo en false, pero lo ideal es true/2 con el CA bien instalado
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => false,
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 0,
      CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,             

    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER     => [
        'Content-Type: application/json',
        'Authorization: Bearer ' . $auth
    ],
]);

$res = curl_exec($curl);

$http_status = curl_getinfo($curl, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);

if ($http_status != 200) {
    $info = curl_getinfo($curl);
    //$info = json_encode($info);
    curl_close($curl);

    return "Hubo un error al momento de consultar a la aplicación - HTTP $http_status\n"
         . "Respuesta:\n$res\n\n"
         . "Info:\n" . $info . ' - URL: '.$url_full;
}


curl_close($curl);


$response = json_decode($res,true);


return $response;

script.title: Obtener cliente Tia

//$auth = 'eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsInR5cCIgOiAiSldUIiwia2lkIiA6ICI0RExIOUk3Y1hNLWVjbVhhN3J0WUh1MFFYdHREMDlYaEhsb3l3SzlUTUhBIn0..pmb6_lo8c8RB6DKSvz2ElAkCc927MqjhGYz0zIMB7NjUEu5MmPrIx1-vmvLeb-v86W4pfTORKnZqh4RshyWnDkCNzL8HnXgzAfw0eG5gvLyNKl52W-fUk9OybakEgOFO0LhwqpWLhtZiiC8KoiTl1IJsFKA9lNeTiFBCG3KgxsJ0vIccLAWyOB3RJA3ygZkxaiM-cavALTkDXjk25Mo4bfn5JadykRSeoo5b5v-wbha6xvINQaP-eXznmQC2-Slg-rjoRZXtBejZVHZB4Fu5kn_f5XNgMgdDov9UufIZYFDK0mQpASCgLnWsIBISAA-GvHRXCgVgsuhoYwHCIhx-zg';

}

    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => false,
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 0,
      CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,             

    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER     => [
        'Content-Type: application/json',
        'Authorization: Bearer ' . $auth
    ],
]);

$res = curl_exec($curl);

$http_status = curl_getinfo($curl, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);

if ($http_status != 200) {
    $info = curl_getinfo($curl);
    //$info = json_encode($info);
    curl_close($curl);

    return "Hubo un error al momento de consultar a la aplicación - HTTP $http_status\n"
         . "Respuesta:\n$res\n\n"
         . "Info:\n" . $info . ' - URL: '.$url_full;
}


curl_close($curl);


$response = json_decode($res,true);


return $response;

<?php

$url = getenv("API_GATEWAY_URL");

//$path = "/api/document/api/party-ws/party/v1/CED/1016037034";
$path = "/api/document/api/party-ws/party/v1/";
$tokenApiPath = '/api/token/v1/api/security/auth/login';

$docType = $data["frm_tomador_tipoDoc"];
$numDoc = $data["frm_tomador_numDoc"];

$path = $path . $docType .'/'.$numDoc;

$url_full = $url . "". $path;

//$url_full = 'https://68.155.90.178/api/document/api/party-ws/party/v1/CED/9986387244';


//$url_full_asegurado = 'https://68.155.90.178/api/document/api/party-ws/party/v1/CED/1016037034';

//frm_aseguradoEsTomador || SI

$curl = curl_init($url_full);
/*$tipoDoc = $data['frmCCTom_tipoDoc'];
$numDoc = $data['frmCCTom_numDoc'];*/
$auth = $data['respuesta_token_tia'];
//$auth = 'eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsInR5cCIgOiAiSldUIiwia2lkIiA6ICI0RExIOUk3Y1hNLWVjbVhhN3J0WUh1MFFYdHREMDlYaEhsb3l3SzlUTUhBIn0..pmb6_lo8c8RB6DKSvz2ElAkCc927MqjhGYz0zIMB7NjUEu5MmPrIx1-vmvLeb-v86W4pfTORKnZqh4RshyWnDkCNzL8HnXgzAfw0eG5gvLyNKl52W-fUk9OybakEgOFO0LhwqpWLhtZiiC8KoiTl1IJsFKA9lNeTiFBCG3KgxsJ0vIccLAWyOB3RJA3ygZkxaiM-cavALTkDXjk25Mo4bfn5JadykRSeoo5b5v-wbha6xvINQaP-eXznmQC2-Slg-rjoRZXtBejZVHZB4Fu5kn_f5XNgMgdDov9UufIZYFDK0mQpASCgLnWsIBISAA-GvHRXCgVgsuhoYwHCIhx-zg';

if($auth == ''){
    echo "Sin token";
    //return "Sin token aun";
}

curl_setopt_array($curl, [
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT        => 10,
    CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 30,
    //CURLOPT_VERBOSE        => true,
    CURLOPT_STDERR         => $f,
    CURLOPT_IPRESOLVE      => CURL_IPRESOLVE_V4,
    // En pruebas puedes dejarlo en false, pero lo ideal es true/2 con el CA bien instalado
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => false,
    CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 0,
      CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,             

    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER     => [
        'Content-Type: application/json',
        'Authorization: Bearer ' . $auth
    ],
]);

$res = curl_exec($curl);

$http_status = curl_getinfo($curl, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);

if ($http_status != 200) {
    $info = curl_getinfo($curl);
    //$info = json_encode($info);
    curl_close($curl);

    return "Hubo un error al momento de consultar a la aplicación - HTTP $http_status\n"
         . "Respuesta:\n$res\n\n"
         . "Info:\n" . $info . ' - URL: '.$url_full;
}


curl_close($curl);


$response = json_decode($res,true);


return $response;
